texto: In the technological world...it is no longer a question of dominating nature or society in order to be more free or more happy, but of mastery for mastery's sake, of domination for the sake of domination. Why? For no end, precisely, or rather: because it is quite simply impossible to do otherwise, given the nature of societies entirely governed by competition, by the absolute imperative to 'advance or perish'.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Luc Ferry que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “In the technological world...it is no longer a question of dominating nature or society in order …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre felicidade, capitalism, competition, com foco em termino e competition.

texto: The problem, however, is that I have yet to meet anyone, materialist or otherwise, who was able to dispense with value judgements. On the contrary, the literature of materialism is peculiarly marked by its wholesale profusion of denunciations of all sorts. Starting with Marx and Nietzsche, materialists have never been able to refrain from passing continuous moral judgement on all and sundry, which their whole philosophy might be expected to discourage them from doing.
explicacao: Citação de Luc Ferry sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The problem, however, is that I have yet to meet anyone, materialist or otherwise, who was able t…” articula coragem, humanism, materialism em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e materialism.

texto: Our history, especially that of the great religions, Christianity in particular, has given us a "hidden prejudice" in favor of the "beyond" at the expense of the "here and now" and this must be changed.(quoted from The Age of Atheists" by Peter Watson, p 25)
explicacao: Orientação direta de Luc Ferry sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “Our history, especially that of the great religions, Christianity in particular, has given us a "…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, atheism, god, útil em momentos de mudanca e god.
